query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: Riyadh
Destination: Siwa
Dates: 2026-08-02 to 2026-08-04
Budget: Balanced
Party: Only Me
Interests: Festivals and Events, Camel Riding

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan adheres to the provided schema, including all required fields and their expected data types.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The suggested accommodation, Siwa Paradise Hotel, is located in Siwa and is described as mid-range, aligning with the user's 'Balanced' budget preference.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The user specified 'Origin: Riyadh', but the travel plan's summary and budget breakdown explicitly state 'from Cairo' and only estimate transport costs from Cairo, thus failing to account for the primary travel cost from Riyadh.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: On Day 3, the itinerary schedules 'Hotel Check-out & Departure Preparation' from 2:00 PM to 5:00 PM, but then lists a 'Farewell Dinner' from 7:00 PM to 8:30 PM, which is illogical if the user has already departed.

judge_grader.reason: All specified constraints (Destination, Duration, Budget, Number of People, Dates) are met by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_summary: A refreshing 3-day solo journey from Cairo to the serene Siwa Oasis, exploring ancient sites, local culture, and enjoying authentic Egyptian cuisine, perfectly tailored for a balanced budget.

itinerary.day: Day 1: Arrival & Mountain of the Dead

activities.title: Hotel Check-in: Siwa Paradise Hotel
activities.description: Arrive in Siwa and check into your comfortable hotel, the Siwa Paradise Hotel, known for its mid-range comforts and strategic location. Take some time to settle in and refresh.

activities.title: Lunch at Tekeyet Elamir Restaurant & Café
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch at Tekeyet Elamir, a highly-rated local and international cuisine restaurant. Savor their Chef's Specials in a pleasant setting.

activities.title: Explore Gebel al-Mawta (Mountain of the Dead)
activities.description: Spend your afternoon exploring the fascinating Gebel al-Mawta, a unique natural site and ancient necropolis in Siwa. Discover its historical tombs and enjoy panoramic views.

activities.title: Dinner at New Star Siwa
activities.description: Conclude your day with a satisfying dinner at New Star Siwa, offering a blend of local and international dishes. A perfect spot to reflect on your first day's adventures.

activities.title: Morning Relaxation & Local Exploration
activities.description: Enjoy a relaxed morning at your hotel or take a leisurely stroll around the nearby areas, soaking in the unique atmosphere of Siwa. Perhaps visit a local market for authentic souvenirs.

activities.title: Lunch at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات و الاكل العربي
activities.description: Indulge in a delightful lunch at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات و الاكل العربي, known for its local and international cuisine. Their Chef's Specials come highly recommended.

activities.title: Explore the Heart of Siwa Oasis
activities.description: Immerse yourself in the cultural beauty of Siwa Oasis. Discover its historical charm, traditional architecture, and lush date palm groves, experiencing the vibrant local life.

activities.title: Dinner at Siwa Gate
activities.description: Dine at Siwa Gate, a restaurant offering a good selection of local and international dishes. It's a great place to unwind after a day of exploration.

activities.title: Morning at Leisure & Souvenir Shopping
activities.description: Enjoy a relaxed morning. You might choose to relax by the hotel, take a final dip in a spring, or explore local shops for unique Siwan handicrafts and souvenirs.

activities.title: Lunch at BEDOUIN - ROOF RESTAURENT .. مطعم بدو
activities.description: Have a memorable lunch at BEDOUIN - ROOF RESTAURENT, enjoying their unique ambiance and Chef's Specials. It's a great spot for a farewell meal.

activities.title: Hotel Check-out & Departure Preparation
activities.description: Check out from Siwa Paradise Hotel. Enjoy some final moments in Siwa, gather your belongings, and prepare for your onward journey.

activities.title: Farewell Dinner at Nacho Siwa Restaurant & Cafe
activities.description: Enjoy your final dinner in Siwa at the highly-rated Nacho Siwa Restaurant & Cafe. Savor their delicious offerings before heading back to Cairo.

budget_breakdown: Flights/Transport: EGP 1000 (Estimated round trip from Cairo)

landmarks.title: Gebel al-Mawta
landmarks.description: The Mountain of the Dead, an ancient necropolis with tombs.

landmarks.title: Tekeyet Elamir Restaurant & Café
landmarks.description: Restaurant for local and international cuisine.

landmarks.title: New Star Siwa
landmarks.description: Restaurant offering local and international dishes.

landmarks.title: Siwa Oasis
landmarks.description: The cultural heart of Siwa, known for its beauty and history.

landmarks.title: مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات و الاكل العربي
landmarks.description: A restaurant specializing in grilled dishes and Arab food.

landmarks.title: Siwa Gate
landmarks.description: Restaurant offering local and international cuisine.

landmarks.title: Nacho Siwa Restaurant & Cafe
landmarks.description: A highly-rated restaurant and cafe in Siwa.
